sections.paragraph:
Pekah H6492
Son of Remaliah.
Captain of the army of Israel
2Ki 15:25
Conspires against and assassinates King Pekahiah
2Ki 15:25
Is made king of Israel
2Ki 15:27
Victorious in war with Judah
2Ch 28:6
Is plotted against and slain by Hoshea
2Ki 15:31
Prophecies against
Isa 7:16; Isa 8:10
